name: ASUS PRIME B850M-A WIFI-CSM Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x1 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 10Gbps Type-A - HDMI 2.1 - 2x DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11ax 2x2 Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: ASUS PRIME B850M-A WIFI-CSM Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x
description: Micro-ATX AM5 motherboard with PCIe 5.0, Wi-Fi 6E, and dual DisplayPort for balanced performance builds.
